title: Opioid medication review documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting chronic pain, opioid use, medicine history, psychosocial context, alcohol or illicit substance context, function, and specialist involvement.
assessment.rationale: Supports opioid use, medicine history, chronic pain, psychosocial, substance-use and functional assessment for opioid medication review documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: Surgery and Opioids: Best Practice Guidelines 2021
source.population: People undergoing surgery, including people with chronic pain or preoperative opioid use.
source.setting: Preoperative assessment, perioperative planning, PACU, discharge, pain service, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting chronic pain, current opioid use, medicine and psychosocial or substance history, functional pain assessment, clinician-entered perioperative plan, complex pain review, discharge communication, and pain-service follow-up. Medication changes, doses, and tapering are not mapped; scheduled review is overdue.

exact_location.heading: Preoperative assessment of pain and opioid use

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting chronic pain, opioid use, medicine history, psychosocial context, alcohol or illicit substance context, function, and specialist involvement.

assessment.text: Supports functional pain assessment, complex pain or pain-service review, discharge communication, and clinician-arranged follow-up without autonomous treatment.
assessment.rationale: Supports functional pain assessment and pain-service review context for opioid medication review documentation; no decision is generated.
